General.Name: Tianjin Constr Dvlp Grp Co Ltd
General.Description: Tianjin Construction Development Group Co., Ltd. engages in the civil engineering construction business in Tianjin. The company provides municipal public construction works, such as road construction and traffic facilities construction; foundation works, including foundation construction and earthworks; building construction related works comprise building renovation, decoration, and intelligent building construction; and petrochemical engineering works, such as filling station upgrading and renovation, pipe installation, and oil tank overhaul projects. It also offers property rental services; sells construction materials; and undertakes construction works of municipal, property, and decoration projects. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Tianjin, China. Tianjin Construction Development Group Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Shengyuan Group Holdings (Tianjin) Co., Ltd.
